chapter_title: Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title

markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 1. Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title [4000 - 5506]
#### Article 3. Registration of Foreign Vehicles [4300 - 4309]
##### § 4308

In the event the department refuses to grant an application for registration in this State of a vehicle previously registered in another state, the department shall immediately return to the applicant all documents submitted by the applicant with the application.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: In the event the department refuses to grant an application for registration in this State of a vehicle previously registered in another state, the department shall immediately return to the applicant all documents submitted by the applicant with the application.
